name: FormFill MCP
description: Fill any PDF form from your AI agent in a single tool call. Supports fillable PDFs, multi-page forms, and pay-per-use via x402 or API key.

tools.name: list_form_fields
tools.description: Inspect a PDF and return every fillable field name, type, and current value.

tools.name: fill_form
tools.description: Fill a PDF form with the given field values and save the result to disk.

tools.name: fill_form_multipage
tools.description: Fill a multi-page PDF form, iterating page-by-page for reliability on complex or long documents.

tools.name: extract_form_data
tools.description: Extract all form field values from a filled PDF form.

tools.name: flatten_form
tools.description: Flatten a filled PDF form so form fields become non-editable static content.

env.name: FORMFILL_API_KEY
env.description: Your FormFill API key. Get one at https://formfill.plenitudo.ai
